title: Synthesize API auth behavior without losing contradictory edge cases
task_prompt: Read the provided API documents and produce a skill that captures auth flows, contradictory rate-limit notes, and required rollout checks.
forbidden_actions: delete repo files unrelated to the task

observable_checks.notes: Judge whether required auth distinctions were preserved.

rubric_dimensions.name: coverage
rubric_dimensions.description: Captures all required auth modes and rollout checks.

rubric_dimensions.name: source-fidelity
rubric_dimensions.description: Preserves contradictions and context-specific guidance instead of flattening them.
